title: T-016 — API: LP picker + FEFO suggestion (TO line)
prompt:
Implement endpoint `GET /api/planning/transfer-orders/lp-suggestions?product_id=&warehouse_id=&qty=` returning available LPs sorted by FEFO (expiry_date asc) by default with FIFO fallback for non-expiring items. Result includes lp_id, expiry_date, remaining_qty, status badge, fefo_score. Calls 05-WAREHOUSE LP query helper.

Server Action `attachLpsToToLine({ to_line_id, lp_ids[] })` writes to_line_lps rows after re-validating availability.

RED test asserts FEFO ordering, deterministic tie-break, and that reserved/quarantine LPs are excluded.

pipeline_inputs.description: FEFO/FIFO LP suggestion endpoint and attach helper for TO lines.
pipeline_inputs.details: Query: `SELECT * FROM lps WHERE product_id=? AND warehouse_id=? AND status='available' ORDER BY expiry_date ASC NULLS LAST, lp_code ASC LIMIT 50`. Reserved/quarantine excluded by status filter. fefo_score = days_until_expiry. Tie-break by lp_code asc.
acceptance_criteria: Given 5 LPs with expiries 2026-05-01, 2026-04-01, NULL, 2026-04-01, 2026-03-01, when GET runs, then result is ordered 2026-03-01, 2026-04-01 (lp_code asc), 2026-04-01 (lp_code asc), 2026-05-01, NULL.
Given an LP with status='reserved', when GET runs, then it is not in the result.
Given attachLpsToToLine called with an lp now reserved by another WO, when validated, then HTTP 409 with code 'V-PLAN-TO-006'.
Given `pnpm vitest run src/app/api/planning/transfer-orders/lp-suggestions/__tests__/route.test.ts`, when run, then 0 failures.
test_strategy: RED tests for FEFO ordering, exclusion of reserved, and re-validation at attach.
risk_red_lines: Do not include reserved or quarantine LPs in suggestions — would bypass hard-lock semantics.
Do not skip re-validation at attach time.
